headline: Lessons the Nasdaq learned from the Facebook IPO for SpaceX's
summary: SpaceX (SPCX) is finally off to the races and publicly trading after its historic IPO on Friday, June 12. Nasdaq (NDAQ) President Nelson Griggs sits down with Market Catalysts Host Julie Hyman and Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi to discuss the lessons his company has learned from Facebook's — now Meta Platforms (META) — own IPO in 2012.

content.title: Lessons the Nasdaq learned from the Facebook IPO for SpaceX's
content.description:
SpaceX (SPCX) is finally off to the races and publicly trading after its historic IPO on Friday, June 12.

Nasdaq (NDAQ) President Nelson Griggs sits down with Market Catalysts Host Julie Hyman and Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi to discuss the lessons his company has learned from Facebook's — now Meta Platforms (META) — own IPO in 2012.

headline: How Investors May Respond To Morgan Stanley (MS) Opening Stock-Plan Platforms To External AI Agents
summary: Morgan Stanley recently completed multiple fixed-income offerings, including €1.50 billion and £1.00 billion of callable fixed-to-floating senior notes, and several US$50 million–US$75 million fixed-rate senior notes maturing between 2027 and 2032. Alongside these funding moves, the bank is opening its ShareWorks and Equity Edge platforms to external AI agents, signaling a push to deepen client automation and differentiate its equity compensation services through advanced technology...

headline: Big Winners From the SpaceX IPO? The Bankers.
summary: SpaceX shares were at almost $173 in late trading on Friday, up 28% from the $135 IPO price and 15% from the $150 opening price. Things are on track for an orderly one-day post-IPO pop. A 10% to 30% pop for a large tech IPO is normal and shows that the deal was priced well and the market was ready to accept the terms offered.

content.title: Big Winners From the SpaceX IPO? The Bankers.
content.summary: SpaceX shares were at almost $173 in late trading on Friday, up 28% from the $135 IPO price and 15% from the $150 opening price. Things are on track for an orderly one-day post-IPO pop. A 10% to 30% pop for a large tech IPO is normal and shows that the deal was priced well and the market was ready to accept the terms offered.

headline: Morgan Stanley resets staggering Chewy stock target
summary: Chewy (CHWY) posted record profits, beat earnings expectations, and added nearly 200,000 net customers in its latest quarter. Then investors pushed the stock to its lowest level in over a year. The sell-off followed a revenue guidance cut. Chewy trimmed its organic full-year fiscal 2026 revenue ...

headline: Week’s Best: Investing in Energy as the War Winds Down
summary: The Iran war sent oil and gas prices surging and sharpened investors’ focus on energy investments.  Now that the conflict appears likely to end, the question is how to play the sector: Some investors are leaning into traditional oil-patch names, while others favor pipelines and natural gas.  For a recent Barron’s Advisor Big Q, we asked a panel of investment professionals how they’re putting money to work in energy now.

content.title: Week’s Best: Investing in Energy as the War Winds Down
content.summary: The Iran war sent oil and gas prices surging and sharpened investors’ focus on energy investments.  Now that the conflict appears likely to end, the question is how to play the sector: Some investors are leaning into traditional oil-patch names, while others favor pipelines and natural gas.  For a recent Barron’s Advisor Big Q, we asked a panel of investment professionals how they’re putting money to work in energy now.

headline: Schwab and Robinhood Stocks Get a Boost on SpaceX IPO Day
summary: Shares of several retail brokers that offered shares of SpaceX to customers at the IPO price rose on Friday, although not as dramatically as SpaceX's more than 20% gain.  Charles Schwab shares were up 3% in late afternoon trading Friday, although the company also had some non-SpaceX good news of its own that probably helped boost the stock: solid growth in new assets and brokerage accounts.  Robinhood's stock gained more than 1.5%, despite the fact that the firm reported some technical issues earlier Friday due to the "record-breaking traffic."

Robinhood's stock gained more than 1.5%, despite the fact that the firm reported some technical issues earlier Friday due to the "record-breaking traffic."
